---
title: "Dev Diary Template"
description: Template for new dev diary posts. Copy this file into docs/src/content/devDiaries/, fill in the frontmatter, and write the body.
---

This is a reference template for new dev diary posts. It is **not** part of the published site (it lives outside `docs/src/content/`, so Astro does not pick it up).

To use it:

1. Copy this file to `docs/src/content/devDiaries/NN-short-slug.mdx` where `NN` is the next diary number.
2. Replace the frontmatter below with real values.
3. Replace each section in the body with real content. The section list is a starting structure, not a required outline.

## Frontmatter

```yaml
---
title: "Dev Diary #NN: Short Catchy Title"
description: One-sentence summary of the release.
permalink: /dev-diaries/NN-short-slug/
author: Author Name
date: 2026-02-26
version: "v2.0"
tags:
  - dev diary
---
```

Field notes:

- `title` — what shows in the dev-diaries index. Plain text, no Markdown.
- `description` — one sentence, used for the page meta description and the index card.
- `permalink` — must be unique. Pattern: `/dev-diaries/NN-short-slug/`.
- `author` — byline. The published site renders the matching author profile.
- `date` — ISO date (year-month-day). Drives the archive order.
- `version` — release version for index grouping. Format: `vMAJOR.MINOR` (e.g. `v2.0`). Do not put version strings in `tags`.
- `tags` — thematic labels only (e.g. `dev diary`). No `v2.0`-style version tags.

## Overview

Use this section for a short summary of the release goals, key systems touched, and expected gameplay impact.

## Main Topics

### Topic One

Describe the first major system in this release. Cover mechanics, balance, AI behaviour, and any known issues.

### Topic Two

Describe the second major system.

## Balance Notes

Any stat, cost, or role-ratio changes that affect competitive play. If a system was intentionally under- or overtuned and will be revisited, say so here.

## Bug Fixes

A short list. Link to issues where applicable. The full bug list belongs in the changelog, not here.

## Coming Next

What is planned for the next diary. Keep it short; teasers are fine, commitments are not.

## Credits

Anyone who contributed to the systems in this diary beyond the listed author. Use Discord handles if real names are not public.

---

## Authoring notes

- Voice: first person plural ("we"), conversational, not press-release.
- Match the tone of the existing dev diaries (`55-algeria-le-pouvoir.mdx`, `57-geenland-holiday-paradise.mdx`). Those are human-authored; do not paste AI output into them without a full pass.
- Em dashes are banned in changelog entries and discouraged in diary prose. Use periods, commas, or parentheses instead.
- British spelling (colour, armour, flavour) is discouraged in general prose. Match the diary voice if you have a strong preference.
- Cross-link liberally to `/tutorials/`, `/dev-resources/`, and `/changelogs/`. The site-wide link checker will catch broken ones before merge.
- Image links use `/assets/images/...` paths. Drop new images into `docs/src/assets/images/` first.
- Do not commit secrets, API keys, or `.env` files. If the diary mentions a real Discord channel or handle, ask before publishing.
